Results are calculated when a sketch is: Hoʻomaulia ʻia nā hopena ke hana ʻia a hōʻano hou ʻia paha kahi sketch. Hiki ke hoʻokaʻawale ʻia nā polygons i mea e helu ai no nā keʻa antimeridian a i ʻole e hoʻopili me nā sketch ʻē aʻe i loko o kahi hōʻiliʻili.
SeaSketch creates optimized layers for f: Hoʻokumu ʻo SeaSketch i nā papa i hoʻonohonoho pono ʻia no ka hana wikiwiki. Pono e hana ʻia kēia mau mea i hoʻokahi wale nō manawa, a i ʻole i ka wā e hoʻonui ʻia ai kahi papa kumu.
Select cells where this property is: E koho i nā pūnaewele kahi o kēia waiwai
Select one or more options to limit cell: E koho i hoʻokahi a ʻoi aku paha nā koho e kaupalena i nā cell i nā mea me nā waiwai like. Inā ʻaʻohe koho i hana ʻia, ʻaʻole e hoʻopili ʻia kēia kānana.

SignInToSketch: E ʻoluʻolu <2>e ʻeʻe</2> a i ʻole <6>hana i moʻokāki</6> e hoʻomaka ai e hana i nā kiʻi kiʻi.

These metrics are calculated in order to: Ua helu ʻia kēia mau metrika i mea e hāʻawi ai i nā helu helu pono e like me ka uhi pakeneka. E like me nā papa i hoʻomaikaʻi ʻia, ua helu hou ʻia lākou inā hōʻano hou ʻia kahi papa kumu.
